pulseNotes: 2026-06-22 05:32 MDT: Re-checked the Gumroad public post HTML directly. The title is still `Faster customer replies for local businesses - Levi Kritzik | Ferris Automations`, the H1 is still `Faster customer replies for local businesses`, and the meta description still truncates at `reactivati`, so the public post remains the weakest live discovery surface. The next reversible Gumroad pass stays seller-side and source-only.

2026-06-22 05:24 MDT: Re-checked the outreach mailbox with Himalaya and wired that watch into the machine-readable control layer. The latest 12 inbox messages still contain no owner/manager replies, the newest visible mail is still platform/account traffic rather than prospect response, and the newest verified outreach send is still Judd Orthodontics at Sent Mail id `86`. The dashboard now tracks `email-watch-status.md` freshness directly so reply-watch truth can age visibly instead of silently drifting.

Public root and bundle surfaces are still healthy, the public post remains the weakest live discovery surface because its description still clips at `reactivati`, and the next reversible Gumroad pass stays pinned to seller-side post-source inspection only.
